title: Writing an opinion paragraph
explanation:
Writing an opinion paragraph

At B1 level, an opinion paragraph should include a clear point, one or two supporting reasons, and a short conclusion.

  • Opening: In my opinion, ...
  • Support: Firstly, ... Secondly, ...
  • Conclusion: For these reasons, ...

questions.text: [*In my opinion, online learning can be very effective.|My opinion online learning very effective.|Online learning, I opinion effective.]
[*Firstly, it is flexible and saves travel time.|First, flexible and save travel.|Firstly is flexible save travel.]
[*For these reasons, I believe schools should offer both options.|These reasons schools both options.|Because these reasons schools.]
[*However, some students learn better in a classroom.|However some students better classroom.|However, classroom better some students.]

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A paragraph should have one clear main ____.  | *idea | shift | refund
questions.feedback: Good paragraphs focus on one main idea.

questions.text: Use linking words such as firstly, ____, and however. | *secondly | finally only | meanwhile not
Support your opinion with clear ____.  | *reasons | platforms | witnesses
A short conclusion should ____ the main idea. | *summarise | ignore | copy
[*On the one hand, social media helps us stay in touch.|One hand social media stay touch.|Social media one hand touch.]
[*For example, students can revise using videos.|For example students can revising videos.|Example students revise using.]
[*I agree to some extent, but there are disadvantages too.|I agree some extent but disadvantages too are.|Agree some extent disadvantages.]
[*As a result, many people prefer working from home.|As result many people prefering home work.|Result many home.]
